description: Master prompt pack for AASHA AI TEAS — Annanth Aasha Foundation

prompts.use_case: TLN node generation from chapter content
prompts.instruction: Given a chapter title, content, grade, and subject, generate a structured TLN concept summary as JSON: { concept_summary, key_terms, learning_outcomes, simulation_suggestions }. Respond ONLY with valid JSON.
Given a TLN node title and concept, return the best matching asset_id from the registry or null if none match. Respond ONLY with JSON: { asset_id, confidence, reason }.
Generate 10 MCQ + scenario questions for a TLN node. Include: question, options (A-D), correct_answer, explanation, weakness_tag. Respond ONLY with a JSON array.
Given a student's memory tags and weakness tags, suggest a personalised learning sequence for a TLN node. Return JSON: { sequence, estimated_minutes, simulation_required, remediation_nodes }.

prompts.use_case: Simulation type suggestion when no reusable asset is found
prompts.instruction: Given a TLN node title and concept, suggest the best simulation type to generate if no reusable asset exists. Return JSON: { simulation_type, description, interaction_hints }.
Given NGO analytics data, write a 2-3 sentence impact summary for Annanth Aasha Foundation's quarterly report. Focus on student reach, reuse rate, and verified records. Respond as plain text.
Translate a TLN concept summary into the target language (Tamil/Hindi/Telugu). Preserve educational meaning and grade-appropriate vocabulary. Respond with ONLY the translated concept text.

prompts.use_case: Remediation path design for failed assessments
prompts.instruction: Given a student's weakness_tags and failed node_id, suggest a remediation path. Return JSON: { remediation_nodes, exercises, estimated_minutes, re_assessment_recommended }.
